scope.summary:
Create the ProseMirror-style block document model for the native Rust rich-text editor. This is the BRAIN of the entire E2 cluster: every other MT depends on it. The model must support a document tree of typed nodes (doc, paragraph, heading[1-3], blockquote, code_block, ordered_list, bullet_list, list_item, table, table_row, table_cell, task_item, hard_break, horizontal_rule) and inline marks (bold, italic, underline, strike, code, link, wikilink). It is built on the 'ropey' crate for O(log n) rope-backed text storage per text leaf, with a typed Transform/Step system for atomic document mutations and a bounded undo/redo history (UndoManager, default 200 steps).

EXPECTED DIFF SHAPE: create new module tree at src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/ containing: mod.rs (re-exports), node.rs (BlockNode/InlineNode/NodeKind enums + Mark enum), schema.rs (compile-time schema registry, validates node/mark combinations), rope_text.rs (ropey::Rope wrapper with char-index helpers), transform.rs (Step enum: InsertText, DeleteText, InsertNode, DeleteNode, SplitNode, MergeNodes, AddMark, RemoveMark; Transaction struct collecting Steps; apply_transaction(&mut DocNode, Transaction) -> Result<TransactionReceipt>), history.rs (UndoManager: push_transaction, undo, redo, can_undo, can_redo, history capped at 200 entries), position.rs (DocPosition: resolved path through the tree = Vec<(node_index, char_offset)>; resolve(doc, absolute_offset) -> DocPosition; absolute_offset(doc, DocPosition) -> usize), selection.rs (Selection: TextSelection{anchor,head} and NodeSelection{node_path}), and doc_json.rs (DocJson: serde serialize/deserialize to/from the same JSONContent shape used by Tiptap in the React reference, schema_version = 'rich_document_v1', compatible with the backend knowledge/documents content_json field).

VERTICAL-SLICE PROOF FIRST: before filling every node/mark variant, ship: paragraph node + bold/italic marks + InsertText/DeleteText/AddMark/RemoveMark steps + UndoManager + DocJson round-trip. Extend to the full set in the same MT; the acceptance criteria require all node/mark types.

FILES TO CREATE:
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/mod.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/node.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/schema.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/rope_text.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/transform.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/history.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/position.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/selection.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/document_model/doc_json.rs
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/mod.rs (add pub mod document_model)

FILES TO EDIT (REUSE):
- src/frontend/handshake_native/src/lib.rs (register pub mod rich_editor alongside the existing WP-011 modules)

CRATES TO ADD (handshake-native crate Cargo.toml):
- ropey = '1' (rope-backed text)
- serde = { version='1', features=['derive'] }
- serde_json = '1'
- thiserror = '1'

STEP-BY-STEP IMPLEMENTATION NOTES:
1. Add [dependencies] ropey, serde, serde_json, thiserror to src/frontend/handshake_native/Cargo.toml (the handshake-native crate).
2. Define NodeKind enum (block variants) and Mark enum (inline mark variants) in node.rs. BlockNode { kind: NodeKind, attrs: HashMap<String,serde_json::Value>, children: Vec<Child> } where Child = Block(BlockNode) | Text(TextLeaf). TextLeaf { rope: Rope, marks: Vec<Mark> }.
3. In schema.rs, define ALLOWED_MARKS_PER_NODE as a static map; implement fn validate_node(node: &BlockNode, schema: &Schema) -> Result<(), SchemaError> checked on every transaction apply.
4. In transform.rs, Step enum covers insert/delete text (char range into a TextLeaf's Rope), insert/delete nodes (by path), split/merge nodes, add/remove mark over char range. Transaction is Vec<Step> + metadata (actor_kind, actor_id). apply_transaction clones the doc, applies each step in order, runs schema validation; on error rolls back and returns Err. TransactionReceipt carries the inverse steps for undo.
5. In history.rs, UndoManager stores a VecDeque<TransactionReceipt> capped at 200; undo re-applies the inverse steps; redo re-applies the forward steps.
6. In position.rs, DocPosition is a path Vec<usize> (child indices through the tree) + char_offset: usize. resolve(doc, abs) walks the tree accumulating char lengths.
7. In doc_json.rs, implement serde Serialize/Deserialize that maps to the Tiptap JSONContent shape: {type:'doc', content:[{type:'paragraph',content:[{type:'text',text:'...',marks:[{type:'bold'}]}]}]}. The schema_version field must equal 'rich_document_v1' (same as WP009_RICH_DOCUMENT_SCHEMA_VERSION in the React reference).
8. Wire src/frontend/handshake_native/src/rich_editor/mod.rs to pub mod document_model, and register pub mod rich_editor in src/frontend/handshake_native/src/lib.rs.
9. Write a flat cargo integration test src/frontend/handshake_native/tests/test_document_model.rs (or inline #[cfg(test)]) covering: insert text, delete text, undo/redo round-trip, add/remove mark, insert/delete block node, split paragraph, merge paragraphs, DocJson serialize then deserialize equals original doc.

DEPENDENCIES: WP-KERNEL-011 shell must exist (the handshake-native crate at src/frontend/handshake_native/ is bootstrapped with lib.rs, app.rs, event_bus.rs, command_registry.rs, etc.). No prior E2 MT needed. This is a cross-WP dependency on WP-KERNEL-011, not an in-WP depends_on edge.

RISK IF MISSED: Every downstream MT (MT-012 through MT-020) has no model to bind to; the entire cluster is blocked.
acceptance_criteria: All node kinds compile: doc, paragraph, heading[1-3], blockquote, code_block, ordered_list, bullet_list, list_item, table, table_row, table_cell, task_item, hard_break, horizontal_rule.
All mark kinds compile: bold, italic, underline, strike, code, link, wikilink.
apply_transaction with InsertText produces the correct rope state verified by char-level assertion in a cargo test.
apply_transaction with AddMark then RemoveMark over a text range round-trips with zero marks in a cargo test.
apply_transaction returns Err and leaves the doc unchanged when a schema violation occurs (e.g. paragraph inside a text leaf), verified by cargo test.
UndoManager: after 3 transactions, undo 3 times restores the original doc state, verified by DocJson equality in a cargo test.
UndoManager caps at 200 entries: pushing 201 transactions drops the oldest, verified by cargo test.
DocJson round-trip: serialize a multi-paragraph doc with bold/italic marks to JSON and deserialize back; the result equals the original doc, verified by cargo test.

DocJson output matches the Tiptap JSONContent shape (type field = node kind string, content array, text field on text nodes, marks array with type field), verified by serde_json::Value assertion in a cargo test.
`cargo test` for the document_model module passes with 0 failures and 0 compilation errors.
No SQLite, no CDN, no external process calls anywhere in this module.
proof_targets: cargo test -p handshake-native -- document_model outputs 'test result: ok' with the test count >= 9.
Paste the full test output (lines 'test ... ok') into the validator handoff.
No `cargo check` or `cargo build` warnings about unused imports or dead code in the new module files.
implementation_notes: Use ropey::Rope for text leaves, not String; this is what enables O(log n) insert/delete at arbitrary char positions which is mandatory for the IME and caret work in MT-012.

Keep BlockNode and TextLeaf as plain Rust structs (Clone + Debug + PartialEq) so the UndoManager can cheaply clone the doc for the undo stack. Avoid Arc<Mutex<>> at this layer; the renderer (MT-012) takes a read reference.
The Step enum inverse computation (for undo receipt) must be computed BEFORE the step is applied (capture the old content first).
DocJson's serde implementation must NOT use #[serde(flatten)] on the attrs HashMap because serde_json loses type information; instead serialize attrs as a 'attrs' key with a serde_json::Value.
schema.rs is a compile-time const table, not a runtime-loaded file; use a lazy_static or const fn approach.
The Mark enum must carry typed payloads for link (href: String) and wikilink (kind: String, value: String, label: Option<String>) because the render layer (MT-012/MT-015) needs them.
All error types use thiserror::Error derives.
AccessKit: this layer has no UI widgets; AccessKit author_ids are assigned in MT-012 which consumes the model. No AccessKit calls here.
The doc_json module must import schema_version from a single const (RICH_DOCUMENT_SCHEMA_VERSION = 'rich_document_v1') so a version bump is a one-line change.
ports_from_react: app/src/lib/editor/build_editor_extensions.ts (node/mark type inventory via Tiptap StarterKit + custom extensions)
app/src/lib/editor/wikilink.ts (Mark::Wikilink payload shape: refKind, refValue, label)
binds_backend_api: POST /knowledge/documents (createRichDocument) - content_json field must accept this module's DocJson serialization
GET /knowledge/documents/:id (loadRichDocument) - content_json field is deserialized by this module
PUT /knowledge/documents/:id/save (saveRichDocument) - content_json sent is this module's DocJson output

risks: Rope char-index vs byte-index confusion causes silent data corruption when non-ASCII text (CJK, emoji) is inserted.
Transaction apply partially mutates the doc then fails schema validation, leaving the doc in a corrupt intermediate state.
DocJson round-trip silently drops attributes (e.g. heading level, link href) that are not in the base serde derive.
UndoManager inverse steps computed AFTER apply (not before) cause undo to produce wrong content.
schema_version mismatch causes the backend to reject the document on first save; the editor shows a blank or 500 error.
Unlimited undo history causes OOM on documents edited for hours without a save.
minimum_controls: All text operations must use Rope::char() / Rope::insert_char() / Rope::remove() on char indices, never byte indices; a dedicated cargo test must insert a 4-byte emoji at position 1 and verify the char count.
apply_transaction must clone the doc BEFORE applying any step and restore the clone on any Err return; verified by the schema-violation cargo test in acceptance_criteria.
DocJson serde tests must assert specific attr values (heading level attr, link href attr) survive the round-trip.
The UndoManager must compute inverse steps before each step's apply call in a deterministic order; unit test verifies undo of InsertText produces the exact pre-insert rope content.
schema_version const must equal the string 'rich_document_v1' (case-sensitive); a test must assert it equals the string literally.
UndoManager cap is tested at exactly 201 pushes; the test checks history.len() == 200 afterwards.
